cannotBook.title: A visit cannot be booked
cannotBook.noVoBalance: {{name}} has used their allowance of visits for this month.
cannotBook.bookFromDate: You can book a visit from {{date}}.
cannotBook.transferOrRelease: {{name}} is no longer at {{prisonName}}. They may have moved to another prison or been released.
cannotBook.findHowToBook: If they have moved to another prison, find out how to book a visit at their new prison.
cannotBook.findPrisoner: For help contacting them, you can apply to find a prisoner’s location.
cannotBook.unsupportedPrison: {{name}} is at {{prisonName}}. This prison is not currently supported by this service.
cannotBook.bookAtThisPrison: Find out how to book a visit at this prison.
cannotBook.noEligibleAdultVisitor: One person on a visit must be 18 years old or older. None of your adult visitors can be selected. This may be because of a new restriction or a ban.
cannotBook.addNewVisitorDescription: The person you want to book a visit for must be on the prisoner’s visitor list.
cannotBook.addNewVisitorRequest: To make a request to book a visit for someone new, complete the form. We will respond within 5 working days.

selectVisitors.title: Who is going on the visit?

visitorLimits.maxVisitors: Up to $t(common:plurals.person, {"count": {{maxVisitors}} }) can visit someone at {{prisonName}}. This includes:
visitorLimits.atLeastOneAdult: At least one visitor must be 18 years or older.

selectVisitors.banDateHint: If they are selected as a visitor, the visit must be on or after this date.
selectVisitors.cannotBookForVisitor: You cannot currently book a visit for this visitor.
selectVisitors.reviewedByPrison: Requests to link visitors are reviewed by the prison.

bookForSomeoneElse.detailsHeading: Want to book for someone else?
bookForSomeoneElse.linkedVisitorsOnly: You can only book visits for people linked to your account.
bookForSomeoneElse.mustBeOnVisitorList: Visitors must be on the prisoner’s visitor list.
bookForSomeoneElse.linkVisitorAction: Make a request to link a visitor

closedVisit.title: This will be a closed visit
closedVisit.description: On a closed visit, the prisoner and visitors cannot have physical contact or pass any items.
closedVisit.cancelAndReturnHome: Cancel and return to the homepage

sessionUnavailable.title: Your visit time is no longer available.

chooseVisitTime.title: Choose the visit time
chooseVisitTime.reservationTime: Select one visit time. It will be reserved for 10 minutes.
chooseVisitTime.prisonerVisitTimes: Only times that {{name}} can attend are shown.
chooseVisitTime.onlyAfterDate: Only visit times on or after this date are shown.
chooseVisitTime.chooseOneOption: You can only choose one option

chooseVisitTimeNoSessions.title: A visit cannot be booked
chooseVisitTimeNoSessions.noAvailableTimes: There are currently no available visit times for {{name}}.
chooseVisitTimeNoSessions.tryLater: Try again later to see if new visit times have become available.
chooseVisitTimeNoSessions.contactPrison: If you believe the prisoner should have available visit times, you can contact the prison directly.

additionalSupport.title: Is additional support needed for any of the visitors?
additionalSupport.description: Tell us about any support that visitors will need because of a health condition or disability. For example, wheelchair access.
additionalSupport.prisonSupport: {{prisonName}} will make reasonable adjustments for the visit, but may not be able to fulfil your request.

mainContact.title: Who is the main contact for this visit?

contactDetails.title: Contact details
contactDetails.description1: We use contact details to send updates about the visit.
contactDetails.description2: The main contact can get both emails and text messages.
contactDetails.ukMobileHint: If this is a UK mobile phone number, we will send a text message to confirm the visit

visitBooked.title: Visit booked
visitBooked.confirmByText: A text message confirming the visit will be sent to the main contact.
visitBooked.confirmByEmail: An email confirming the visit will be sent to the main contact.
visitBooked.confirmByEmailAndText: An email and a text message confirming the visit will be sent to the main contact.
visitBooked.withReference: This will include the visit reference.
visitBooked.checkVisitDetails: When signed in to GOV.UK One Login, you can check the details of your visits.
visitBooked.feedback: You can help us to improve this service by giving feedback.

visitRequested.title: Visit requested
visitRequested.requestReviewBy: It will now be reviewed by {{prisonName}}.
visitRequested.detailsByText: We have sent a text message with the details of your request to the main contact.
visitRequested.detailsByEmail: We have sent an email with the details of your request to the main contact.
visitRequested.detailsByEmailAndText: We have sent an email and a text message with the details of your request to the main contact.
visitRequested.notBookedYet: Your visit is not booked yet. It needs to be checked.
visitRequested.confirmOrReject: {{prisonName}} will confirm or reject your request.
visitRequested.responseByText: A text message with the prison’s decision will be sent to the main contact.
visitRequested.responseByEmail: An email with the prison’s decision will be sent to the main contact.
visitRequested.responseByEmailAndText: An email and a text message with the prison’s decision will be sent to the main contact.
visitRequested.upcomingVisitsStatus: Your visits page also shows the status of upcoming visits.
